name: ai.nefesh/human-state
title: Nefesh — Real-Time Human State Awareness for AI
description: B2B middleware API that fuses biometric signals (heart rate, HRV, voice, facial expression, text sentiment) into a unified stress score (0-100) with behavioral adaptation prompts. 7 MCP tools, 4 A2A skills. Closed-loop adaptation feedback. Trigger memory for cross-session psychological context. Free tier: 1,000 calls/month.

headers.name: X-Nefesh-Key
headers.description: API key. Get free at https://nefesh.ai/signup (1,000 calls/month) or connect without a key and use the request_api_key tool.
